auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Serply API key sent in the X-Api-Key request header. View and manage it in the Serply Dashboard: https://app.serply.io.

actions.name: google_news_search
actions.description: Search Google News through Serply and return feed-style article results.

query.description: A URL-encoded query string such as q=openai or q=stock+market&num=10.

proxyLocation.description: The Serply proxy location used for the request.

userAgent.description: The Serply X-User-Agent device mode used for the request.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for one Serply search-style request.

title.description: The feed title returned by Serply.

generator.description: The feed generator returned by Serply.

link.description: The feed URL returned by Serply.

language.description: The feed language returned by Serply.

publisher.description: The feed publisher returned by Serply.

updated.description: The feed updated timestamp returned by Serply.

title.description: The article title returned by Serply.

link.description: The article URL returned by Serply.

summary.description: The article summary returned by Serply.

published.description: The article published timestamp returned by Serply.

source.description: The article source returned by Serply.

items.description: One news entry returned by Serply.

entries.description: The news entries returned by Serply.

feed.description: The Google News feed object returned by Serply.

items.description: One entity object returned by Serply for the news query.

entities.description: The entity objects returned by Serply.

outputSchema.description: Normalized output for a Serply Google News response.

actions.name: google_scholar_search
actions.description: Search Google Scholar through Serply and return academic result entries.

query.description: A URL-encoded query string such as q=openai or q=stock+market&num=10.

proxyLocation.description: The Serply proxy location used for the request.

userAgent.description: The Serply X-User-Agent device mode used for the request.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for one Serply search-style request.

results.description: The search results returned by Serply.

total.description: The total number of results returned by Serply.

items.description: One answer string returned by Serply.

anyOf.description: The answer box strings returned by Serply.

ts.description: The request timestamp returned by Serply.

device_region.description: The device region returned by Serply.

device_type.description: The device type returned by Serply.

outputSchema.description: Normalized output for a Serply search-style response.
